大发国际是正规平台吗【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100534_63905809<br>vk.com/topic-239100500_64981065<br>vk.com/topic-239090246_64243572<br>vk.com/topic-239100573_64093501<br>vk.com/topic-239100566_64243586<br>vk.com/topic-239079440_64981090<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64522259<br>vk.com/topic-239100606_64243617<br>vk.com/topic-239100565_63822589<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64679151<br>vk.com/topic-239100474_63905894<br>vk.com/topic-239100519_64679157<br>vk.com/topic-239100514_63905895<br>vk.com/topic-239100486_64243649<br>vk.com/topic-239049142_64522280<br>vk.com/topic-239049145_63822674<br>vk.com/topic-239100488_64409308<br>vk.com/topic-239100476_64243681<br>vk.com/topic-239100531_65560265<br>vk.com/topic-239100483_64093565<br>vk.com/topic-239100520_64981144<br>vk.com/topic-239100456_64243689<br>vk.com/topic-239100513_64093575<br>vk.com/topic-239100490_64981149<br>vk.com/topic-239100524_63905943<br>vk.com/topic-239100457_65354323<br>vk.com/topic-239100455_63822709<br>vk.com/topic-239100459_64679214<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65354344<br>vk.com/topic-239100458_64409358<br>vk.com/topic-239100467_65354361<br>vk.com/topic-239100470_64981192<br>vk.com/topic-239100468_64409377<br>vk.com/to
